nasb.text: “They struck me, but I did not become ill; They beat me, but I did not know it. When shall I awake? I will seek another drink.”

esv.text: “They struck me,” you will say, “but I was not hurt; they beat me, but I did not feel it. When shall I awake? I must have another drink.”

cnv.text: 你必說：“人打我，我不痛； 人鞭打我，我不曉得； 我甚麼時候清醒？ 我還要再去尋酒。”

ccb.text: 你会说：“人打我，我不痛； 人揍我，我不知。 什么时候醒了，再干一杯！”

csbs.text: “他们打我，我不疼痛； 他们击打我，我也不知道。 我什么时候醒来呢？ 我还要继续寻找酒。”
